title: WIP: [skip ci] hack: make get_ci_vm.sh work rootless

comments.body: @edsantiago PTAL see if this works for you.

Sigh...seems this is too much effort, as changes need to be coordinated with the gcloud image.  I use that image for other purposes, and don't want to debug/troubleshoot those as well.  Far easier to just enable sudo for podman use.
